axes.name: id_fidelity
axes.description: Every project_id, todo_id, and goal_id in the emitted updates[] is present in the input. Pass (2): all ids round-trip from the input verbatim; no fabricated uuids. Partial (1): one fabricated or mismatched id but the rest are correct. Fail (0): any update references an id that wasn't in the input, OR the agent silently retargets to a different project than the utterance implies.

axes.name: scope_discipline
axes.description: Skill stays within record-what-happened — no planning, prioritizing, or critique. Pass (2): when the utterance is a question or planning request, updates[] is empty, ambiguous=false, and confirmation redirects to the right surface. Partial (1): empty updates[] but confirmation drifts into advice-giving. Fail (0): emits writes for a planning utterance, OR fills body_markdown with agent-synthesized planning content instead of the user's words.

axes.name: user_words_preserved
axes.description: When entries.insert is emitted, body_markdown is the user's utterance with at most light grammar edits. Pass (2): body_markdown reads as the user's voice; no reframing. Partial (1): body_markdown captures the substance but adds agent framing or summarization. Fail (0): body_markdown is paraphrased or reframed in agent-voice, OR omits key words from the user's utterance.

axes.name: output_contract
axes.description: Response ends with a single fenced ```json block matching the documented shape. Pass (2): exactly one fenced JSON block, last in the message, parses cleanly, has updates[]/matched_project/ambiguous/confirmation fields. Partial (1): JSON parses but is missing one optional field, OR contains extra prose after the block. Fail (0): no JSON block, multiple JSON blocks, JSON in the middle of the message, or schema-violating fields (e.g. unrecognized op/table values).

axes.name: ambiguity_handling
axes.description: When the utterance plausibly matches more than one project, asks instead of guessing. Pass (2): ambiguous=true, updates=[], confirmation contains a one-sentence disambiguation question naming the candidates. Partial (1): asks but also emits a tentative update, or names only one candidate. Fail (0): silently picks one project and writes, OR asks when the input was unambiguous.

axes.name: write_economy
axes.description: Single-todo flips don't double-log to entries; multi-faceted utterances log everything they should. Pass (2): clear single-todo completion → update_todo only; status-shift utterance → update + entry; work-without-matching-todo → entry only. Partial (1): correct calls but adds one redundant entries.insert for a routine flip. Fail (0): logs every flip to entries (noise), OR misses an entries.insert when the utterance contained reasoning the user wants kept.
